summary: Replaced vague ScienceDirect 2019 Mexico station citation with specific reference: Rosales-Linares et al. (2019), J. Atmos. Sol.-Terr. Phys., DOI: 10.1016/j.jastp.2018.08.006. Paper analyzed 5 G2-G4 events using 2015-2017 Mexican station data, found statistically significant amplitude enhancement in all cases. Also softened literature claims to note results vary by storm phase, station location, and methodology.
